author.bio: Built @happeningdotnet. Helped launch Zcash, interested in p2p and privacy tech, social networks.
author.name: Jay Graber

content.text: Looks like a Tron dev just accidentally opened a PR on IPFS master that renames "IPFS" to "BTFS". Such contribution, much wow. Planning to market it as something BitTorrent acquisition related? 👀
